channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maine Democrats Develop a Replacement Process for Platner; Here Is What to Expect
Nigel Farage's By-Election Opponents Are a Remarkable Clown Show
WATCH: Democratic Governor Mocked for Criticizing 'Tribal' Politics Amid Redistricting Push: 'Hypocrisy Knows No Bounds'
item.description: Gov. Wes Moore faces accusations of hypocrisy after his July 4th speech criticizing tribalism while pushing a special session to redistrict Rep. Andy Harr...

item.title: Republicans Claim Democrats Are 'Completely Stained' After Backing Platner Through Multiple Scandals
item.description: Republicans are linking Graham Platner's toxic controversies to Democrats in key House and Senate midterm races that will determine congressional cont...
